pr_metadata.title: Add partitioned payments mart for capstone migration
pr_metadata.body: Migrates Oracle staging into BigQuery mart with explicit columns and event_date filter.
pr_metadata.head: feature/payments-mart-safe

patches.patch:
+++ b/models/marts/fact_payments.sql
+SELECT payment_id, event_date, amount_usd
+FROM {{ ref('stg_payments') }}
+WHERE event_date >= DATE('2024-01-01')
